brand.descriptor: Microsoft Fluent Design: Segoe UI, #0078d4 blue accent, subtle depth with shadow, clean geometry, 4px radius
Apple Human Interface: SF Pro / system-ui, generous white space, blur backdrops, thin light borders, 12px radius, #007aff accent
Google Material Design 3: Roboto, tonal surfaces, #6750a4 purple, 28px large radius, elevated cards
Spotify: dark #121212 bg, #1DB954 green accent, circular elements, card-based, Inter font
Netflix: near-black #141414 bg, #e50914 red accent, bold imagery feel, clean sans-serif
GitHub Primer: #0d1117 dark or #ffffff light, #238636 green, monospace accents, minimal borders, system font stack
Discord: #313338 dark bg, #5865f2 blurple accent, gg sans / Noto Sans, rounded 8px, pill-shaped buttons
Slack: white/light bg, #611f69 aubergine accent, Lato font, friendly rounded design, colorful sidebar feel
Linear: dark #1b1b1f bg, purple-blue gradient accent, Inter font, ultra-clean lines, subtle glass cards
Notion: pure white bg, #37352f near-black text, minimal borders, Inter/serif toggle feel, 0px radius, icon-forward
Stripe: white bg, #635bff purple accent, system font, gradient mesh backgrounds, smooth shadows, 8px radius
Vercel: #000000 bg, pure white text, blue #0070f3 accent, Geist font, sharp edges 0 radius, developer aesthetic
Figma: white bg, #0d99ff blue accent, Inter font, colorful tags, rounded 8px, design tool professional
Adobe: dark #1d1d1d bg, #1473e6 blue accent, Adobe Clean font feel, tab-heavy UI, sharp corners
IBM Carbon: #161616 cool gray bg, #0f62fe blue accent, IBM Plex Sans/Mono, 0px radius, structured grid, industrial precision
Samsung One UI: light #f7f7f7 bg, #1259a9 blue accent, One UI feel, large 16px radius, spacious padding, friendly
Tesla: dark #171717 bg, white text, minimal red accents, clean sans-serif, futuristic minimal, 4px radius
Porsche: white bg, #d5001c red accent, Porsche Next feel serif/sans, luxury spacing, 2px radius, understated elegance
MUJI: warm #f5f1eb bg, #8b7355 brown accent, minimal sans-serif, extreme whitespace, no decoration, natural palette
IKEA: white bg, #0058a3 blue + #ffda1a yellow accent, Noto Sans, friendly bold, 8px radius, Scandinavian clean

design-school.descriptor: Brutalist design: white bg, black text, monospace font, no radius, hard 4px shadows, raw HTML aesthetic, red accents
Swiss/International: white bg, Helvetica/Inter, strict grid, primary color blocks (#ff0000, #0000ff), 0 radius, clean rules
Art Deco: dark #1a1a2e bg, gold #d4af37 accent, geometric patterns, Playfair Display serif, elegant borders, 2px radius
Bauhaus: white bg, primary colors (#ff0000 #0000ff #ffcc00), geometric shapes, Futura/Inter, strong grid, 0 radius
Wabi-sabi: warm parchment #f2ece4 bg, muted earth #8b7355, irregular edges feel, handwritten + serif, organic shapes, 4px radius
Memphis Design: light pink #ffe4e1 bg, bright multi-color accents, bold geometric patterns, playful sans-serif, 12px radius
De Stijl: pure white bg, only black + #ff0000 + #0000ff + #ffcc00, sharp grid, no radius, thick borders, Futura font
Art Nouveau: cream #faf5ef bg, deep green #2d5a27 + gold #b8860b, decorative serif fonts, flowing organic curves, 8px radius
Cyberpunk: black #0a0a0a bg, neon magenta #ff006e + cyan #00e5ff, monospace VT323, glitch effects, 0 radius, scanline overlay
Steampunk: dark brown #2a1f14 bg, brass #b8860b + copper #b87333 accents, serif font, gear/mechanical feel, paper texture
Vaporwave: pastel gradient pink-purple bg, #ff71ce pink + #01cdfe cyan, retro serif, 90s aesthetic, soft shadows
Y2K: silver #e8e8e8 bg, chrome gradients, bright #00ff00 + #ff00ff accents, pixelated monospace, futuristic 2000s, 16px radius
Scandinavian: warm white #fafaf7 bg, soft gray + muted blue #6b8fa3, clean sans-serif, airy spacing, 4px radius, cozy minimal
Industrial: concrete gray #e0ddd7 bg, exposed black text, rust orange #c65d07 accent, monospace, raw edges, 0 radius
Cottagecore: soft green #f0f5e8 bg, sage #7a9e7e + rose #c97b84, handwritten/serif fonts, warm and organic, 12px radius

mood.descriptor: Ocean calm: soft blue #e8f4f8 bg, deep navy #1a365d text, sea green #2c7a7b accent, serif font, fluid and serene, 8px radius
Forest morning: misty green #e8f0e4 bg, dark bark #2d3a2e text, emerald #38734c accent, natural serif, earthy shadow, 4px radius
Desert sunset: warm sand #f5e6d3 bg, terracotta #c2603f accent, burnt sienna, warm serif, golden hour palette, 6px radius
Tokyo night: dark #1a1b26 bg, neon pink #f7768e + blue #7aa2f7 accent, monospace, urban glow, 4px radius, electric
Cozy cafe: warm cream #f8f0e3 bg, coffee brown #6f4e37 text, caramel #c68642 accent, rounded serif, 8px radius, inviting
Arctic aurora: deep blue #0b1426 bg, aurora green #40e0d0 + purple #9b59b6 accent, clean sans-serif, icy glow, 6px radius
Mediterranean: warm white #faf7f0 bg, terracotta #cc5a36 + azure #2b6cb0 accent, elegant serif, sun-washed, 4px radius
Zen garden: soft gray #f5f3f0 bg, stone #7a7267 text, moss green #6b8e5e accent, minimal sans, extreme space, 2px radius
Space station: dark void #0d0d1a bg, starlight white text, electric blue #3d85c6 accent, monospace, futuristic, 4px radius
Vintage library: aged paper #f4eed5 bg, leather brown #5c4033 text, gold #b8860b accent, classic serif, warm shadow, 2px radius
Rainy day: cool gray #e8eaed bg, slate #475569 text, steel blue #64748b accent, soft sans-serif, muted palette, 8px radius
Tropical beach: bright white #fffef7 bg, ocean blue #0891b2 + coral #f97316 accent, friendly sans, vibrant, 12px radius
Mountain lodge: warm wood #f2e8d9 bg, pine #3a5a40 text, amber #d97706 accent, rustic serif, cozy shadow, 4px radius
City skyline: charcoal #1e1e2e bg, cool white text, neon blue #3b82f6 accent, modern sans-serif, sharp 2px radius, urban chic
Cherry blossom: soft pink #fff0f3 bg, plum #5c2d50 text, sakura #ec4899 accent, elegant serif, delicate, 10px radius
